name: Medicale Corp.
summary: PART I Our Company Medicale Corp (we, our or the Company) was incorporated in the State of Nevada on August 17, 2020. To date we have not generated revenue from our business operations. Furthermore, as we are still in the early stages of developing our business and expect to operate at a loss as we grow our business.
